statusLine.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".workspace.current_dir"); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".model.display_name"); ctx=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".context_window.remaining_percentage // empty"); in_tok=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".context_window.current_usage.input_tokens // empty"); out_tok=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".context_window.current_usage.output_tokens // empty"); cache=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".context_window.current_usage.cache_read_input_tokens // empty"); time=$(date +%H:%M); dir=$(basename "$cwd"); branch=$(git -C "$cwd" -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then git -C "$cwd" -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false diff --quiet 2>/dev/null && git -C "$cwd" -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null && changed="clean" || changed="dirty"; fi; py="${CONDA_DEFAULT_ENV:-${VIRTUAL_ENV:+$(basename "$VIRTUAL_ENV")}}"; printf "\033[38;5;179m[%s]\033[0m " "$time"; printf "\033[38;5;75m%s\033[0m" "$dir"; [ -n "$branch" ] && { [ "$changed" = "dirty" ] && printf " \033[38;5;215m%s\033[0m" "$branch" || printf " \033[38;5;221m%s\033[0m" "$branch"; }; [ -n "$py" ] && printf " \033[38;5;190m🐍 %s\033[0m" "$py"; printf " \033[90m%s\033[0m" "$model"; [ -n "$ctx" ] && printf " \033[90mCtx:%s%%\033[0m" "$ctx"; if [ -n "$in_tok" ] && [ -n "$out_tok" ]; then total=$((in_tok + out_tok)); printf " \033[38;5;156m⚡ %s tok\033[0m" "$total"; [ -n "$cache" ] && [ "$cache" != "0" ] && printf " \033[90m(cache:%s)\033[0m" "$cache"; fi; echo'
